scenarios.rubric_notes: Reply cites workspace.md (P5 section header, 'phases communicate exclusively through the workspace') and permission-model.md (file.write, shell, MCP permissions). Lists 3 numbered concrete points. Specific evidence: 'P5 (Workspace is the single source of truth)', 'Control IR ops executed by the OS'. No fabrication detected.
scenarios.note: B55 regressed V->R on aggregation-not-3-points. B56: 3 numbered points present — noise, not persistent regression.

scenarios.rubric_notes: Reply organized by 3 facets (種類/設定方法/よくある落とし穴). Cites file.read/write/edit/delete, shell, mcp, python safe/unsafe, http.get, web_search from permission-model; reyn permissions list/revoke/clear from manage-permissions; skill.md permissions: and reyn.yaml config from permissions config reference. No fabricated config keys.

6 pillars listed. Cites principles.md (P1-P8), architecture.md (layered execution), workspace.md (P5, event log). All 3 source docs cited by name. Each pillar has source doc attribution. No fabrication. B54 prompt fix (full paths in parentheses) confirmed effective — step LLM used correct paths.

Reply organized by 3 questions. (1) Skill: cites phase-vs-skill-vs-os.md Phase/Skill/OS layered design, postprocessor block. (2) MCP: cites mcp.md client (MCPClient, permissions.mcp), server (reyn mcp serve, list_agents/send_to_agent). (3) 自作Skill: cites your-first-skill (skill_builder, reyn run, --events, skill_improver). No fabrication.

Reply organized by 3 facets. (1) Skill/tool: cites build-an-agent-team (reyn agent new, reyn topology new launch --kind team, safety.loop.max_agent_hops). (2) Permission: cites manage-permissions (.reyn/approvals.yaml, reyn permissions list). (3) MCP: cites mcp.md (mcp.servers:, reyn mcp serve, mcp_called/completed/failed events). No fabrication.

new_findings.description: B55 S1 regression (V->R, aggregation not 3+ points) was noise, not persistent. B56 S1 produced 3 clearly numbered and distinct points with specific evidence from both docs. Hypothesis: single-batch LLM variance, no structural fix needed.

All 5 plan_mode scenarios reached V (5/5). This is the first 5/5 V run for this scenario set. B54 S3 full-path prompt fix continues to hold — plan steps preserve docs/concepts/ prefix in path generation.
